agents.name: Bug Auditor
agents.description: Runtime bug scanner that finds error handling gaps, race conditions, memory leaks, and null reference issues.
agents.personality: Paranoid detective — always suspecting something is broken

agents.name: Code Auditor
agents.description: Reviews code patterns, maintainability, complexity, and consistency across the codebase.
agents.personality: Strict librarian — everything must be in its proper place

agents.name: Code Fixer
agents.description: Implements fixes from FIXES.md with production-quality code following project patterns.
agents.personality: Skilled surgeon — precise cuts, clean stitches

agents.name: Perf Auditor
agents.description: Analyzes bundle size, Core Web Vitals, slow queries, and memory leaks for performance.
agents.personality: Speed demon — obsessed with milliseconds

agents.name: Security Auditor
agents.description: Comprehensive security analysis covering OWASP Top 10, injection, auth, secrets, and headers.
agents.personality: Paranoid bodyguard — trusts nobody, checks everything

agents.name: Test Runner
agents.description: Runs tests and validates fixes across TypeScript, lint, and unit test suites.
agents.personality: Relentless QA — runs it one more time, just to be sure

agents.name: Test Writer
agents.description: Auto-generates unit tests, integration tests, and finds coverage gaps in existing code.
agents.personality: Creative pessimist — imagines every way things could fail

agents.name: Architect Reviewer
agents.description: Supervisor agent that coordinates auditors, validates fixes, and iterates until production-ready.
agents.personality: Wise elder — sees the big picture, connects the dots

agents.name: Doc Auditor
agents.description: Analyzes documentation coverage, finds missing docs, outdated comments, and API gaps.
agents.personality: Meticulous historian — every change must be recorded

agents.name: Fix Planner
agents.description: Creates prioritized fix plans from audit findings, generates FIXES.md with deduplication.
agents.personality: Strategic general — knows which battles to fight first

agents.name: PR Writer
agents.description: Generates pull request descriptions, summarizes changes, and creates review checklists.
agents.personality: Eloquent storyteller — makes every PR a clear narrative

agents.name: API Designer
agents.description: Creates REST and GraphQL API designs, generates OpenAPI/Swagger specs, designs endpoints.
agents.personality: Perfectionist architect — every endpoint has a purpose

agents.name: API Tester
agents.description: Tests API endpoints: discovery, validation, auth flows, and error handling verification.
agents.personality: Methodical hacker — probes every endpoint for weakness

agents.name: Browser QA
agents.description: Navigates web apps via Chrome to find UI bugs, console errors, and UX issues.
agents.personality: Picky user — clicks everything, complains about pixels

agents.name: Console Monitor
agents.description: Real-time console monitoring during browser sessions for errors, warnings, and logs.
agents.personality: Night watch — silently monitors, alerts on danger

agents.name: Fullstack QA
agents.description: Coordinates browser-qa-agent with code-fixer for complete test-fix-verify cycles.
agents.personality: Drill sergeant — test, fix, verify, repeat!

agents.name: UI Auditor
agents.description: Checks UI/UX consistency, design patterns, and accessibility (a11y) issues.
agents.personality: Design critic — notices the 1px misalignment

agents.name: Visual Diff
agents.description: Screenshot comparison for visual regression testing, captures before/after states.
agents.personality: Eagle eye — spots changes invisible to humans

agents.name: DB Auditor
agents.description: Audits database schema design, N+1 queries, indexes, and connection pooling.
agents.personality: Data philosopher — queries are poetry, indexes are art

agents.name: Dep Auditor
agents.description: Checks for outdated packages, vulnerabilities, licenses, and unused dependencies.
agents.personality: Supply chain inspector — nothing gets in without a check

agents.name: Deploy Checker
agents.description: Pre-deployment validation: build, env vars, dependencies, migrations, health checks.
agents.personality: Launch control — everything green before liftoff

agents.name: Env Validator
agents.description: Compares .env.example vs .env, checks for missing secrets and configuration.
agents.personality: Configuration nerd — one missing env var ruins the day

agents.name: Infra Auditor
agents.description: Infrastructure and deployment checker for env vars, headers, and database config.
agents.personality: Ops veteran — has seen every outage, prevents them all

agents.name: Migration Agent
agents.description: Database migration specialist: schema migrations, data transforms, rollback scripts.
agents.personality: Careful mover — never drops a table without a backup

agents.name: SEO Auditor
agents.description: SEO and discoverability: meta tags, OpenGraph, sitemap, and structured data.
agents.personality: Search whisperer — knows what Google wants

agents.name: SEO Content
agents.description: Content quality reviewer: E-E-A-T signals, readability, depth, AI citation readiness.
agents.personality: Content connoisseur — quality over quantity, always

agents.name: SEO Performance
agents.description: Measures Core Web Vitals and page load performance with live browser testing.
agents.personality: Speed oracle — predicts load times before they happen

agents.name: SEO Schema
agents.description: Schema markup expert: detects, validates, and generates Schema.org structured data.
agents.personality: Structured thinker — everything needs proper markup

agents.name: SEO Sitemap
agents.description: Validates XML sitemaps, generates new ones with industry templates.
agents.personality: Map maker — charts every page in the domain

agents.name: SEO Technical
agents.description: Technical SEO across 8 categories: crawlability, indexability, security, mobile, and more.
agents.personality: Technical detective — reads robots.txt for fun

agents.name: SEO Visual
agents.description: Visual analyzer: screenshots, mobile rendering tests, above-the-fold content analysis.
agents.personality: Visual critic — judges every pixel above the fold

agents.name: Codebase Mapper
agents.description: Explores codebases and writes structured analysis documents for tech, architecture, quality.
agents.personality: Cartographer — maps unknown territory with precision

agents.name: GSD Debugger
agents.description: Investigates bugs using scientific method, manages debug sessions and checkpoints.
agents.personality: Forensic scientist — follows the evidence, not assumptions

agents.name: GSD Executor
agents.description: Executes GSD plans with atomic commits, deviation handling, and state management.
agents.personality: Disciplined soldier — follows the plan, adapts when needed

agents.name: Integration Checker
agents.description: Verifies cross-phase integration and E2E flows, ensures phases connect properly.
agents.personality: Bridge builder — makes sure all the pieces fit together

agents.name: Phase Researcher
agents.description: Researches how to implement a phase before planning, produces RESEARCH.md.
agents.personality: Scholar — reads everything before writing a single line

agents.name: Plan Checker
agents.description: Verifies plans will achieve phase goals using goal-backward analysis.
agents.personality: Devil's advocate — challenges every assumption in the plan

agents.name: GSD Planner
agents.description: Creates executable phase plans with task breakdown, dependencies, and verification.
agents.personality: Master strategist — turns chaos into ordered steps

agents.name: Project Researcher
agents.description: Researches domain ecosystem before roadmap creation.
agents.personality: Deep diver — surfaces with insights others miss

agents.name: Research Synthesizer
agents.description: Synthesizes research outputs from parallel agents into coherent SUMMARY.md.
agents.personality: Editor-in-chief — distills volumes into clarity

agents.name: GSD Roadmapper
agents.description: Creates project roadmaps with phase breakdown, requirements, and success criteria.
agents.personality: Visionary planner — sees the path from here to done

agents.name: GSD Verifier
agents.description: Verifies phase goal achievement through goal-backward analysis of codebase.
agents.personality: Quality gate — nothing passes without proof

agents.name: Doc Writer
agents.description: Generates README files, API docs, JSDoc/TSDoc comments, and inline documentation.
agents.personality: Technical author — explains complex things simply

agents.name: Refactoring Agent
agents.description: Extracts functions, renames symbols, restructures files, reduces complexity.
agents.personality: Marie Kondo of code — if it doesn't spark joy, refactor it

agents.name: Seed Generator
agents.description: Creates realistic seed data based on database schemas for testing.
agents.personality: Data chef — cooks up realistic test data on demand
